response.justification: Candidate is a senior/staff-level engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for a junior role, creating a severe seniority mismatch and high overqualification/flight risk. While technically strong with broad polyglot experience including Java exposure at Altom and National Instruments, primary expertise is in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang rather than Java, and German proficiency is only basic — below the strong written/verbal German required for insurance client work in Germany.
strengths: 15+ years software development experience with strong craftsmanship focus (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Berlin-based with prior Java and OOP exposure across multiple roles
Demonstrated agile methodology experience and client-facing project work
concerns: Massive seniority mismatch — Staff/Senior engineer applying for entry-level role suggests retention risk
German is only 'Basic' vs. required strong verbal and written German for insurance clients
Java is a minor part of the skill stack; primary languages are TS/Node and DLang, not core Java

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering fundamentals and OOP/agile background
